TextView.android:text:
By using the Mood Journal App, you agree to the following terms.
Usage This application is designed to help users track moods and write personal journal entries.
User Responsibility Users are responsible for keeping their account password secure and private.
Data Storage All journal entries, mood data, and personal details are stored locally on your device. The application does not upload or share your data online.
Appropriate Use The app should only be used for personal wellbeing and reflection purposes.
Updates The application may receive updates and improvements in the future to enhance the user experience.
Acceptance By continuing to use the app, you accept these terms and conditions.
